title: The Earl of Chicago
writer: Lesser Samuels, Charles de Grandcourt, Gene Fowler
actors: Robert Montgomery, Edward Arnold, Reginald Owen
plot: Silky has always moved booze. During prohibition, he smuggled it from Canada, but now that it is legal, he produces his own brand. Seven years before, he sent Doc to prison because Doc was an honest man. Now that he is getting out...
